description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build, Check, and Test that runs on every pull request. Use a matrix job that runs on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macOS-latest) and Python versions (3.6, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9, 3.10). For each combination, check out the code, set up Python, install pipenv, cache dependencies using an S3 cache, install dependencies if the cache misses, lint with flake8, check codestyle and docstyle, cache testmondata, and run incremental tests with pytest.
